subject: Implement trusted-only RAG evidence gating + trust toggle CLI
description: Enforce answering only from trusted sources: filter retrieval by source_document.trust_status='trusted', abstain with fail_reason='untrusted_sources' if no trusted evidence, add scripts/set_source_trust.py CLI with --first-fixture and --trusted flags; add required evidence notes; ensure pytest passes.
activeForm: Implement retrieval filter, abstain fail_reason, and trust toggle CLI; run lsp diagnostics + pytest; write evidence files.
